name: Is Deep Research Reliable? Misleading Knowledge Induces False Conclusions
summary: arXiv:2607.20891v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep Research agents extend LLM-based assistants into long-horizon workflows involving planning, retrieval, evidence synthesis, and report generation...
description: arXiv:2607.20891v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deep Research agents extend LLM-based assistants into long-horizon workflows involving planning, retrieval, evidence synthesis, and report generation, yet their reliability in open information environments remains underexplored. A key concern is whether apparently credible but factually misleading knowledge encountered in such environments can pro...
author: Pengyu Zhu, Lijun Li, Longju Yang, Sen Su
